channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Rotherhithe Street Permit holder TP painted OS 223, 18th July
item.description:
Rotherhithe Street Permit holder TP painted OS 223
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 392, Rotherhithe Street, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken fence gate, 18th July
item.description:
The gate one of many in the park is damaged and not lockable. Due to this people are entering the areas behind the fence which they are not supposed to and carrying out anti social activities like taking drugs etc . This is creating a nuisance to houses bordering the park most of whom have small children and young girls. This is a big crime waiting to happen. The gardeners have also historically failed to lock all these gates after their work. Please fix this as soon as possible

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Saltash Road, East Wickham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large builders bag filled, 18th July
item.description:
Rubbish at top of Kelvington Road at junction of brenchley Gardens and athenlay beside the green salt box. More Rubbish. This is regularly used as a dumping ground

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kelvington Road, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car dumped, 18th July
item.description:
No license plate Next to rouel blue garden club

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): St James's Road, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Opposite 50 Felixstowe Road SE2, 18th July
item.description:
Flytipped bads of clothing have been there for a few days and is now ripped open with some items scattered in the road. I was told on Tuesday that this was already reported along with some on the opposites side of the road… but this lot is still there (picture take about 18:30 on Friday).

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Felixstowe Road, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Horsetail weed, 18th July
item.description:
Corner of Blenheim drive and Chaucer Road There is a continuous and heavy growth of weeds sprouting directly out of the cracks in the public pavement and concrete curb along this section of the highway. The vegetation is spreading along the boundary line and breaking through the public paving slabs. Please arrange for the street cleaning contractors to apply a targeted chemical weed treatment to clear this section of the publicly maintained pavement

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Blenheim Drive, Falconwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cycle lane erosion, 18th July
item.description:
Cycle lane eroded to the point it's become loose sand and pebbles. It's unsafe to cycle on it.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 14, Wolfe Crescent, Rotherhithe, Greater London
